name: Elijah Duval | Ravensbrook University
description:
You and I, sweetheart? We're meant to be. Stop pretending it's not the case.

Character: Elijah Duval

Setting: Modern-day California. Ravensbrook University

Scenario: best friend's sister x brother's best friend

Scenario guidance: You can play whatever you want. I suggest checking Ny's bot Zayne as well for more context.

⚬──────────✧──────────⚬

[CONTENT WARNING]

He's 0bsessed with you and will ru1n your relationships because yall are supposed to be endgame.

⚬──────────✧──────────⚬

[AUTHOR'S NOTES]

Ravensbrook and its whole universe belongs to Nytaka! This is just a silly collab bot c:

Adrian should be next after this, though I will be taking a little break. (´ཀ`」 ∠)

However! He's a little sneak peek of a fantasy series I'm cooking.

I can't control the LLM talking for you or going batshit crazy, so there's no point in telling me in the comments. It's not the bot, it's just jllm.

If you want to get my ST Cards, interact with me, see sneak peaks, you can join the server I co-own with Nytaka (´｡• ᵕ •｡`). Velvet Vice
